## Meeting Purpose

[Interview with Hannah Muniz for Technical Managing Editor role at GrowthX](https://fathom.video/share/xXgSfoyKPsoUC35dVuuuyKVzFGqsz2i6?tab=summary&timestamp=738.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Hannah has 10 years of digital content experience, including managing editor roles and AI tool implementation](https://fathom.video/share/xXgSfoyKPsoUC35dVuuuyKVzFGqsz2i6?tab=summary&timestamp=891.0)
  - [GrowthX seeks candidates with both content expertise and ability to think architecturally about content processes](https://fathom.video/share/xXgSfoyKPsoUC35dVuuuyKVzFGqsz2i6?tab=summary&timestamp=1001.0)
  - [Success in the role requires balancing quality content production, process improvement, and clear feedback on tool functionality](https://fathom.video/share/xXgSfoyKPsoUC35dVuuuyKVzFGqsz2i6?tab=summary&timestamp=1206.0)

## Topics

### Hannah's Background and Experience

  - [10 years in digital content, primarily SEO](https://fathom.video/share/xXgSfoyKPsoUC35dVuuuyKVzFGqsz2i6?tab=summary&timestamp=891.0)
  - [Recent managing editor at Red Ventures for higher education websites](https://fathom.video/share/xXgSfoyKPsoUC35dVuuuyKVzFGqsz2i6?tab=summary&timestamp=914.0)
  - [Led team of 4-6 editors/writers](https://fathom.video/share/xXgSfoyKPsoUC35dVuuuyKVzFGqsz2i6?tab=summary&timestamp=926.0)
  - [Worked on B2C marketing content, lead generation, and brand awareness](https://fathom.video/share/xXgSfoyKPsoUC35dVuuuyKVzFGqsz2i6?tab=summary&timestamp=939.0)
  - [Implemented proprietary AI tool at previous company](https://fathom.video/share/xXgSfoyKPsoUC35dVuuuyKVzFGqsz2i6?tab=summary&timestamp=961.0)

### AI Tool Implementation Experience

  - [Spent 1.5 years integrating new AI editorial platform](https://fathom.video/share/xXgSfoyKPsoUC35dVuuuyKVzFGqsz2i6?tab=summary&timestamp=1036.0)
  - [Tool features: content generation, research aggregation, outline creation](https://fathom.video/share/xXgSfoyKPsoUC35dVuuuyKVzFGqsz2i6?tab=summary&timestamp=1053.0)
  - [Challenges: hit-or-miss content quality, sourcing issues, integration with existing workflows](https://fathom.video/share/xXgSfoyKPsoUC35dVuuuyKVzFGqsz2i6?tab=summary&timestamp=1111.0)
  - [Provided regular feedback to engineering team on tool improvements](https://fathom.video/share/xXgSfoyKPsoUC35dVuuuyKVzFGqsz2i6?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)
  - [Developed processes for bug reporting and feature requests](https://fathom.video/share/xXgSfoyKPsoUC35dVuuuyKVzFGqsz2i6?tab=summary&timestamp=1339.0)

### Leadership and Feedback Approach

  - [Weekly one-on-ones with direct reports](https://fathom.video/share/xXgSfoyKPsoUC35dVuuuyKVzFGqsz2i6?tab=summary&timestamp=1286.0)
  - [Maintained open doc for ongoing feedback collection](https://fathom.video/share/xXgSfoyKPsoUC35dVuuuyKVzFGqsz2i6?tab=summary&timestamp=1304.0)
  - [Anonymized and prioritized feedback for engineering team](https://fathom.video/share/xXgSfoyKPsoUC35dVuuuyKVzFGqsz2i6?tab=summary&timestamp=1316.0)
  - [Encouraged open feedback culture, empowering team to shape AI tool usage](https://fathom.video/share/xXgSfoyKPsoUC35dVuuuyKVzFGqsz2i6?tab=summary&timestamp=1502.0)
  - [Created detailed SOP to standardize AI tool integration into workflow](https://fathom.video/share/xXgSfoyKPsoUC35dVuuuyKVzFGqsz2i6?tab=summary&timestamp=1367.0)

### GrowthX Role and Company Background

  - [Company less than a year old, many employees joined 4-5 months ago](https://fathom.video/share/xXgSfoyKPsoUC35dVuuuyKVzFGqsz2i6?tab=summary&timestamp=1839.0)
  - [Seeking candidates with content expertise and process improvement skills](https://fathom.video/share/xXgSfoyKPsoUC35dVuuuyKVzFGqsz2i6?tab=summary&timestamp=1216.0)
  - [Focus on understanding content architecture and systematic improvement](https://fathom.video/share/xXgSfoyKPsoUC35dVuuuyKVzFGqsz2i6?tab=summary&timestamp=1407.0)
  - [Goal: leverage AI to solve pain points in content creation and management](https://fathom.video/share/xXgSfoyKPsoUC35dVuuuyKVzFGqsz2i6?tab=summary&timestamp=1985.0)

### Role Success Criteria

  - [Balance quality content production with process improvement](https://fathom.video/share/xXgSfoyKPsoUC35dVuuuyKVzFGqsz2i6?tab=summary&timestamp=1449.0)
  - [Articulate clear feedback on tool functionality to engineering team](https://fathom.video/share/xXgSfoyKPsoUC35dVuuuyKVzFGqsz2i6?tab=summary&timestamp=1453.0)
  - [Identify and address bottlenecks in content creation workflow](https://fathom.video/share/xXgSfoyKPsoUC35dVuuuyKVzFGqsz2i6?tab=summary&timestamp=1259.0)
  - [Ability to use and manipulate AI tools directly](https://fathom.video/share/xXgSfoyKPsoUC35dVuuuyKVzFGqsz2i6?tab=summary&timestamp=2208.0)
  - [Juggle content quality, tool optimization, and team management effectively](https://fathom.video/share/xXgSfoyKPsoUC35dVuuuyKVzFGqsz2i6?tab=summary&timestamp=2297.0)

## Next Steps

  - Hannah to consider role alignment with her skills and interests
  - GrowthX to evaluate Hannah's fit for the Technical Managing Editor position
  - Potential follow-up discussions or next interview round if both parties interested
